The angular   distribution   is   of  the  form  1  +
1.5*sin**2 for all neutrons having energy E > 3 MeV.
This   distribution   agrees   with   that  expected
model for ejection from the l = 1 orbit.
Data  were  compiled at  SCJAD of Saratov
